label: Abstract Algebra
shortDescription: A free abstract algebra course covering groups, rings, fields, homomorphisms, and an introduction to Galois theory.
modulesDescription: Read the abstract algebra chapters in order, or jump directly to the topic you need.
ogTitle: Learn Abstract Algebra for Free | CalcPath
ogDescription: Free university abstract algebra course. Groups, homomorphisms, rings, fields, factorization, and Galois theory — with practice problems and full worked solutions.
courseDescription: Free university-level abstract algebra course covering the fundamentals of groups, rings, fields, and an introduction to Galois theory. Master the structural language of modern mathematics with hundreds of practice problems with step-by-step solutions.

topics.title: Groups
topics.description: Definitions, axioms, examples including symmetric and cyclic groups, abelian groups, and orders of elements.

topics.title: Subgroups, Cosets, and Quotient Groups
topics.description: Subgroups, cosets, Lagrange's theorem, normal subgroups, quotient groups, and Sylow theorems.

topics.title: Group Homomorphisms and Isomorphisms
topics.description: Homomorphisms, kernels, images, the three isomorphism theorems, and automorphisms.

topics.title: Rings
topics.description: Ring axioms, subrings, commutative rings, units, zero divisors, and polynomial rings.

topics.title: Ideals and Quotient Rings
topics.description: Ideals, principal ideals, quotient rings, and the correspondence theorem for rings.

topics.title: Integral Domains and Fields
topics.description: Integral domains, fields, characteristic, prime and maximal ideals, and field of fractions.

topics.title: Polynomial Rings and Unique Factorization
topics.description: Polynomial rings, Euclidean domains, PIDs, UFDs, and factorization in F[x].

topics.title: Field Extensions and Galois Theory
topics.description: Field extensions, algebraic and separable extensions, Galois groups, and the fundamental theorem.
